metadata.title: Check your reset email | Slashie
metadata.description: Confirm that Slashie sent your password reset email and request another link if needed.

en.title: Check your email
en.description: If there is a Slashie account for that address, we sent a password reset link. Links expire after 1 hour.
en.descriptionSuffix: , we sent a password reset link. Open the link to choose a new password - the link expires in 1 hour.

metadata.title: 查看重設電郵 | Slashie
metadata.description: 確認 Slashie 已傳送密碼重設電郵，並可按需要重新索取連結。

zh_hk.title: 查看你的電郵
zh_hk.description: 如果該電郵地址有 Slashie 帳戶，我們已傳送密碼重設連結。連結會於 1 小時後失效。
zh_hk.descriptionSuffix: ，我們已傳送密碼重設連結。開啟連結即可選擇新密碼；連結會於 1 小時後失效。
